reviews.review_description: Its really fun different cars and motor bikes and surrons and u go around collecting oil then turned into pregas to make money and there's a roulette table so the only reason I have it 4 stars is because of the community there's people saying the n word and racial discrimination and my friends have a good few thousand and a admin abused his power so I'm sorry for the bad review but I'm honest

You know that you can do client side 16 player lobbies, right? You don’t have to pay for a crappy server. Plus, you can make the hosting client switch if they leave.

No short server timeouts.

No massive server bill.

￼ no limit to main mode servers.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback. Toxic behavior like racial slurs is not something we tolerate, and we’re taking additional steps to strengthen moderation and enforcement.

On the gameplay side, many of the issues you mentioned have already been patched. There are now more ways to earn money, better player distribution across activities, higher penalties for random killing, and fewer incentives for players to grief others. We’ve also been addressing airdrop bugs and other frustrating gameplay problems.

We know that your experience was frustrating, and we appreciate you calling it out. We’re working hard to keep improving the game and make it a much better experience for everyone.

reviews.review_title: The game is OK, but it does deserve a on
reviews.review_description: I played like 30 minutes was getting killed nonstop by just random people that are abusing bugs in the game, crouching all the way down to the point where your body is flat and the only hit box is your head is annoying.. having random people just come up and kill you when you’re just trying to play and figure things out very annoying… and especially charging eight dollars which I guess because it’s an online service game, but there’s many issues.. to me personally I would just wait a little bit longer before spending any money on this. There’s still things that need to be fixed and a lot of things that need to be added. The game is very bland and boring but again if you wanna spend your eight dollars that’s fine but just understand something as soon as you start the game as soon as you get a gun immediately kill don’t even hesitate. Just do what they do and see how much it bothers them.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. If earning money feels too slow, please check the Missions store in the Contract Hub—it includes a few simple challenges that help you make your first cash quickly, so you should be able to afford a car in no time. We’re also reviewing pricing and progression, including vehicles and weapons, based on player input.

developer_response.body:
Looks like you’re in Creative Mode on the Barrely Hills map, that’s just the sandbox.

The actual base game is in the second tab, Barrel Bandits. Click the icon there to join the Main Server.

developer_response.body:
Creating a private lobby is straightforward: go to Lobbies, click Create, configure your lobby settings, and then select Create. Once the lobby is created, click 'Start Game'.

If the game gets stuck during loading, please let us know exactly which step it happens on. Also, please ensure you’re on a stable Wi-Fi connection, as an unstable network can cause loading issues.
